meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Antigravity Project Template for SaaS
content.seo_description: Overcome the SaaS knowledge gap with this Antigravity project template checklist. Learn to ship professional apps fast using Claude Code and AI automation.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready architectural scaffold, abstracting complex SaaS infrastructure into modular, reusable components. By pairing this with Claude Code, freelancers can automate boilerplate generation, security hardening, and database schema design, effectively bypassing the steep learning curve to deliver high-quality, scalable client software at record speeds.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. Your client is waiting, the deadline is a tightening noose, and you are staring at a blank IDE, paralyzed by the sheer mountain of SaaS infrastructure you haven't built yet. The gap between 'freelance coder' and 'SaaS architect' is usually measured in months of painful trial and error. But today, that gap closes.

We are burning the traditional manual setup process to the ground. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you move from zero to a deployed, multi-tenant SaaS architecture in minutes. You aren't just writing code; you are orchestrating a system that does the heavy lifting for you, allowing you to focus on the business logic that actually pays the bills.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Bootstrap the core architecture to ensure type-safety and structural integrity from commit zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready SaaS scaffold using the Antigravity template, including Auth, Stripe integration, and a PostgreSQL schema.

steps.title: Configure Multi-Tenant Database Schema
steps.description: Define tenant isolation early to prevent catastrophic data leakage later.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a multi-tenant database schema with Row Level Security (RLS) policies for a SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update prisma schema for multi-tenancy'

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
steps.description: Secure your endpoints by defining granular permission sets for different user tiers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement an RBAC system with roles for Admin, Manager, and Viewer using the Antigravity auth middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply rbac middleware to all protected routes'

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Stop writing CRUD boilerplate by letting the template handle standard REST patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate REST API endpoints for a 'Projects' resource based on the existing database schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate crud endpoints for project resource'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Infrastructure
steps.description: Prepare the environment for deployment with automated CI/CD pipelines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel/AWS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup deployment pipeline for production'

pro_tips: Use 'context files' in Claude Code to feed your existing documentation into the LLM, ensuring the generated code matches your specific style guide.
Always run a dry-run of your database migrations in a staging environment before pushing to production; the Antigravity CLI supports --dry-run flags.
Keep your prompt engineering modular: don't ask for a whole app; ask for one service at a time to maintain high token fidelity.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-reload' feature during local development to see infrastructure changes reflected instantly without restarting the server.
Audit generated code for security vulnerabilities using automated scanners immediately after the Claude Code agent completes a task.
content.next_steps: Once your base architecture is deployed, integrate a monitoring tool like Sentry to track performance and start inviting beta testers to validate your core features.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with infrastructure and start delivering value that keeps clients coming back. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap to dominate your niche. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
